# Numeric Greater Than

Numeric greater than comparison

```perl
$greater = $a > $b;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$greater = $a > $b;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$greater = $a > $b;
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
